post.message: LLM judge was requested but is unavailable (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or the upstream call errored); deterministic-only verdict stands for this run.

A eslint-disable suppression was added in docs/src/pages/demos/chips/OutlinedChips.js. The checker was silenced rather than the underlying diagnostic resolved; if the PR claims a fix, the suppressed warning may be the defect shipping with its alarm turned off.
post.evidence: alert('You clicked the delete icon.'); // eslint-disable-line no-alert
